name: Bill's Pawn Shop LLC
description_short: Bill's Pawn Shop LLC in Louisville, KY offers collateral-based loans and buys jewelry and other items. Located on North Preston Highway with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Bill's Pawn Shop LLC operates as a traditional pawn shop in the Hillview area of Louisville, Kentucky. The business is listed on the Bullitt County Tourism website, indicating it serves both local residents and visitors to the region. The shop specializes in jewelry transactions and collateral-based lending, which are core pawn shop services.

The shop offers pawn loans secured by personal items, with a focus on jewelry as a primary merchandise category. They buy, sell, and trade jewelry and other valuables. Operating hours are Monday through Friday 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Saturday 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM, with Wednesday and Sunday closures. This schedule accommodates working customers during extended weekday hours.

Bill's Pawn Shop maintains a physical storefront location on North Preston Highway in Louisville, making it accessible to local customers. The business accepts phone inquiries at 502-957-4095 and provides direction-finding assistance for customers. The presence on a tourism listing suggests the business may attract visitors as well as local patrons.

As with all pawn shops, Bill's Pawn Shop serves customers who need quick access to cash or wish to buy used items at discounted prices. However, the website provides no information about loan terms, interest rates, fees, or the specific range of items accepted beyond jewelry. Customers should contact the shop directly for detailed information about loan terms and conditions before conducting business.
pros: Extended weekday hours (10 AM - 6 PM Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday) for working customers
Saturday hours (10 AM - 4 PM) provide weekend access
Physical storefront location on North Preston Highway in Louisville for in-person service
Specializes in jewelry with expertise in jewelry valuation and sales
Listed on official Bullitt County Tourism website, indicating established local presence
Direct phone line (502-957-4095) for immediate customer inquiries
cons: No website with detailed information about loan terms, APR, or fees available
Website provides no clarity on items accepted beyond jewelry category
Closed Wednesday and Sunday, limiting access for some customers
No information about loan duration, repayment terms, or default consequences
Limited online presence restricts ability to research the business before visiting
best_for: Customers needing quick cash loans secured by jewelry or other valuables
Buyers seeking discounted used jewelry or secondhand items
Local Louisville residents with flexible schedules during weekday/Saturday hours
Individuals preferring in-person transactions with physical collateral verification
diagnosis: Bill's Pawn Shop LLC is best for customers in the Louisville area who need immediate cash and have jewelry or other valuables to use as collateral, or who are seeking discounted used jewelry. The primary caveat is that the business lacks online transparency regarding loan terms, interest rates, fees, and specific items accepted, requiring customers to contact or visit in person to understand exact terms before borrowing.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal items
meta_description: Bill's Pawn Shop LLC in Louisville, KY offers collateral-based loans and buys jewelry and other items with extended hours.
